---
name: Security report
about: Do not file public security vulnerabilities here
title: "[Security]: private report required"
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Please do not publish vulnerability details in a public issue.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting if enabled. If that is unavailable, contact the maintainers through a private channel and include:

- affected version, commit, or deployment profile
- impact summary
- reproduction steps
- proof of concept or logs
- whether the issue affects auth, secrets, CI/CD, containers, worker execution, hub governance, artifacts, terminal output, or external exposure surfaces

This template exists to redirect public security reports into a responsible disclosure path.
